scenarios.name: draft minutes are hidden from plain members; only the board group can write

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_board_minutes__meetings (id, title, meeting_date, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'draft', ?, ?, ?)
INSERT INTO app_board_minutes__meetings (id, title, meeting_date, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, adopted_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'adopted', ?, ?, ?, ?)
